title: Email features - Pictures, emojis, a preview function, and attachment issue

posts.author: Moeydc (Jon Moses)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning MC

I am having issues with any emails I send through Monday (Gmail integration) where I paste in pictures to the email, the feedback from my clients is the pictures always fail to load and they have to manually click the picture and request to download them. (this doesnt happen when sending from gmail or outlook) Does anyone have a fix for this?

The same for emails with emojis in them, the emojis turn out to be way bigger than the text which throws the formatting out.

My biggest request for the emails is to be able to preview any placeholders before we hit send. at the moment you can only see the place holder and its hard to know exactly what is being sent or if that placeholder is populated correctly without exiting the email and going back to the line item. - A preview button that shows the placeholder result would be perfect to correct this.

One last thing to note, when we add in a certain number of file attachments, this pushes the top of the email off the screen so you can’t review who the email is being sent to.
